content.text:
I don’t see any text to summarize—just the phrase “Sample text.” Please paste the actual text you want summarized.

If you’d like, I can provide:
- 1-sentence summary
- 3–5 bullet-point summary of key ideas
- short executive summary (a paragraph)
- longer, detailed summary

Tell me the desired length and audience (e.g., plain language for a general audience, or professional for colleagues). Also note if you want a neutral, critical, or persuasive tone.
